conversation_history.content: Hello! To assist you with loan eligibility, please provide your Monthly Income, Existing EMI, Down Payment, and Loan Tenure in years.
monthly income is 1 lakh ,30k emi ,5 lakh down payment
Thank you for the information! I have noted your Monthly Income as ₹100000, Existing EMI as ₹30000, and Down Payment as ₹500000. Could you please provide the Loan Tenure in years or months?
The Loan Tenure you provided is 40 months, which is equivalent to 3.33 years. Please provide a tenure between 1 to 30 years.
Thank you! I have noted your Loan Tenure as 5 years. I'm sending your details for assessment now.
